en: You and Fiona, huh? Who knew?
She's a great gal.
She surprised me last night. She brought over dinner.
ko: 어젯밤에 나를 놀라게 했어. 저녁을 가져왔거든.

en: It's brand new.
Congratulations. I love her.
Yeah.
So I was ready kind of early this morning, since about four,
ko: 오늘 아침에 좀 일찍 준비했어, 한 4시부터,

en: and Matt and Paige left an hour ago for a field trip,
ko: 그리고 매트랑 페이지는 한 시간 전에 현장 학습을 갔어,

en: so I thought I'd come by. I hope that's okay.
Yeah.
I just wanted to say...
I slept on it.
I haven't called Townsend yet, but...
I still feel like it's the right thing to do.
ko: 여전히 이게 옳은 선택인 것 같아.

en: Well...
I didn't sleep so well myself.
Over this?
You remember the day I drove you to the warehouse?
ko: 내가 너를 창고로 데려갔던 날 기억나?

en: You were giving me the wrong directions and all that.
ko: 네가 잘못된 방향을 알려줬던 거 말이야.

en: Yeah, I remember.
Okay, well, I stood in the back,
ko: 좋아, 그럼 나는 뒤에 서 있었고,

en: and I watched you show the warehouse.
